name: Chicken Paprikash
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown chicken in butter in a skillet; remove and set aside.
2. Saute onion in pan drippings until tender; blend in flour, salt, paprika, and pepper. Cook over low heat until bubbly.
3. Gradually add chicken broth; cook, stirring constantly, until smooth and thickened. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Cook noodles according to package instructions; drain. Combine noodles and half of the sour cream sauce; spoon into a shallow 2-quart casserole.
5. Top with chicken; pour remaining sauce over chicken. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
